testcase.name: test_expense_forecast_returns_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:47: in test_expense_forecast_returns_200 assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_expense_forecast_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing next_month field assert 'next_month' in {'detail': 'Invalid authentication credentials'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:54: in test_expense_forecast_structure assert "next_month" in data, "Missing next_month field" E AssertionError: Missing next_month field E assert 'next_month' in {'detail': 'Invalid authentication credentials'}

failure.message: AssertionError: Growth missing weekly_rates assert 'weekly_rates' in {}

testcase.name: test_scheduler_has_eod_summary_job

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:220: in test_scheduler_has_eod_summary_job job_types = [cfg["job_type"] for cfg in data] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:220: in <listcomp> job_types = [cfg["job_type"] for cfg in data] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.name: test_scheduler_eod_can_be_enabled
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:233: in test_scheduler_eod_can_be_enabled assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to enable eod_summary: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to enable eod_summary: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration27_predictive_analytics.py:246: in test_scheduler_eod_can_update_time assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update eod_summary time: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update eod_summary time: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
